positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of an interconnected constellation of forest elements: luminous toadstools, crystalline spiderwebs draped over ferns, and glowing bioluminescent moss forming abstract celestial patterns. The composition should be a dense, circular mandala arrangement, designed to look like a cosmic diagram. Use a deep, saturated jewel-toned palette—sapphire blues, emerald greens, amethyst purples, and pops of electric cyan light. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau organic flow and modern celestial infographic design, featuring strong, clean silhouettes and high contrast between the illuminated elements and the deep background. Intended for seamless, central apparel placement. Vector art quality, high detail, clean lines, isolated on a clean background.
